subject: SIP Weekly Update - Week ending 4 Apr
deck_filename: Counter Taobao Weekly Update - Week ending 4 Apr.pdf

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Performance Dashboard (as of 2 Apr 2025)

A/ Topline/P&L

Note: M-1 P&L is preliminary before book-closing adjustments

Highlights

   1.

   [Topline] Apr proj ADO 182k, 101% RR; ADO as %CB -1pp MoM; proj ADG
   $2.2M, 109%RR; ADG as %CB -1pp MoM
   1.

      Local SIP proj ADO 102% RR, %CB -1.0pp MoM; MoM decline due to MY &
      ID sellers on holiday mode and Raya assortment detrend; in process of
      ramping up evergreen assortment to recover CB%
      2.

      CNSIP proj ADO 100% RR, %CB -0.04p MoM; %CB MoM decline due to
      removal of low ROI ads spending in LATAM lanes. Next step to
complete price
      reduction to catch-up
      2.

   [P&L] Overall proj combined PC2 healthy at Shopee level at $2.1M


B/ ADO breakdown (multiple BU/lanes)


Highlights

   1.

   All top 5 SIP lanes and WH cross-selling lanes on par with projection
   (except for IDMY)
   2.

   IDMY proj 98% RR; platform low RR with ID sellers on holiday mode,
   expecting sellers to fully return on D+12; ads boost, CRM & product promo
   planned for top shops and evergreen assortment after sellers return
   3.

   MYSG proj 113% RR; driven by new SKUs ads automation ramp up with
   commission fee reduction
   4.

   Other lanes 96% RR; as mainly ID-export lanes impacted by ID seller
   absence


C/ BWT


(Use March full month data as Apr MTD performance is skewed with 2-day data
points, Apr data will update from 7th Apr)

Highlights

   1.

   MY custom check loosened but still needs a few more documentation checks
   vs before. Key blocker now is the lack of custom manpower to clear the
   backlog due to holiday impact. Expected to start recovery next week after
   manpower is recovered. CN SLS parcels facing the same situation
   2.

   IDMY 87% RR +0.8 MoM; mainly driven by (1) KUL LH LT worse than expected
   as Malaysia airline terminal experienced a longer delay than expected.
   Shipment took ~1 d

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

CS

Can we not use A market P market anymore? Just use Import/Export? I always
have a hard time remembering which is which

   -

   Noted, will use Import/Export from next weekly report


What does full month here mean? Which month are we referring to? Is there a
way to also look at last month numbers?

   -

   March full month data is used in this table. Will start Apr MTD data
   report from this week


Our chatbot CSAT is really really bad, what is our plan here?

   -

   Lower Chatbot CSAT is low as SIP is using the old NLU model
   -

   Plan to
   -

      Rollout NLU+LLM model; PH, VN, and BR as import markets are in A/B
      testing. Other import markets to start A/B testing from 23 Apr. Full
      rollout by the end of May if results are good
      -

      Set a chatbot CSAT target [ETA 15 Apr]


Agent CSAT for SG is so bad? How come?

   -

   SG Apr MTD agent CSAT has been improved to 73% and expect to hit 80%
   from 14 Apr
   -

   Low CSAT in March was due to poor-performing agents; 11 agents were
   removed from 10 Mar
   -

   Action taken to improve CSAT
   -

      Implemented weekly agent performance monitoring (3 warning letters =
      removal)
      -

      SOPs were updated in past 2 weeks with a CSAT improvement (79% CSAT
      on Apr 8)


Agent productivity in PH is so bad? How come? And yet their average
response rate is so high? How come?

   -

   PH productivity is low at 4.9 due to underutilization. We reviewed the
   HC planning with the PH team and adjusted it on the 1st week of Apr. Apr
   MTD productivity improved to 14.
   -

   Longer average response time is under investigation [ETA 15 Apr]


There is abandon rate and response time issue? In ID export? But their
productivity seems ok

   -

   IDSG/ID/MY/IDPH  abandon rate & average response time is relatively
   higher than other SIP lanes due to higher productivity and high chat

Attaching the pdf in case the snapshots cannot be displayed properly.

content.question: Our chatbot CSAT is really really bad, what is our plan here?

- Lower Chatbot CSAT is low as SIP is using the old NLU model
   - Plan to


   - Rollout NLU+LLM model; PH, VN, and BR as import markets are in A/B
      testing. Other import markets to start A/B testing from 23 Apr. Full
      rollout by the end of May if results are good
      - Set a chatbot CSAT target [ETA 15 Apr]



I thought we will be using LLM model for all import markets?

Slide 14

   - For the 16 new sellers, are they in all markets or?

- The 16 sellers are in most markets as some of them are newly onboarded
      in Shopee, pushing them to onboard to all markets.


   -  How do we convince them to set up shop in as many countries as
   possible?

- We will pitch them to set up shops to all markets with the incentive
      package aligned with each market i.e. if they join 3 mkts, they’ll get
      packages for all 3 mkts


   - Acquisition speed seems very slow if we only acquired 16 over 1 quarter


   - The previous acquisition was without a package. Our acquisition
      package was finalised last week, and we’ll ramp up from this month onwards



Any targets that we are setting here?
